narrative:
Mt Healthy 3-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,051 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.9 percentage points.
